prompt: Cinematic streetwear fashion photoshoot. A confident young South Asian man with a beard and slicked-back hair, leaning against a classic red and white 1950s vintage Chevrolet car. He is wearing a heavy-cotton red oversized graphic t-shirt with bold white text and black cargo pants. Next to him, an elegant black Doberman Pinscher dog sits on a leash. The setting is an old, industrial garage with distressed, peeling mint-green walls. Gritty, urban aesthetic, moody lighting, highly detailed textures, shot on 35mm lens, realistic shadows, editorial style.
